name: Sweet and Sour Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Jar sweet and sour sauce
8 1/2 oz Can pineapple chunks in syrup, drained
1/4 medium Green pepper, cut into 1/4" strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix baking mix, crumbs, salt, paprika, and pepper in a plastic bag.
2. Moisten chicken with cold water. Shake chicken in the bag, one piece at a time, to coat.
3. Arrange chicken, skin sides up and thickest parts towards the outside edges, in a square microwaving dish (8 x 8 x 2").
4. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high (100%) for 8 minutes; rotate the dish half turn.
5. Microwave until done, about 6 to 8 minutes.
6. Place remaining ingredients in a measuring cup of 4 cups. Cover with waxed paper and microwave on high (100%) for 3 minutes; stir.
7. Cover with waxed paper and microwave until green pepper is crisp-tender, 2 or 3 minutes.
8. Serve over chicken.
